title: Legends Awaken
description: A mod that brings together legendary worlds into one immersive experience.
body:
![Legends Awaken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5908b00d91daf45f5f394261772ddc6d6a059f9.png)
**Legends Awaken** is a mod that fuses multiple legendary worlds into one expansive experience — from dinosaurs to dragons, and beyond.

### 🌋 Jurassic Park
- Extract DNA from ancient amber.
- Enhance the quality of genetic material.
- Inject DNA into synthetic eggs to create life.
- Raise and evolve creatures like:
  - 🦖 Velociraptor
  - 🦕 Brachiosaurus
  - 🎺 Parasaurolophus

### 🧬 Advanced Genetics System
- Every DNA item contains:
  - 🧬 Species component
  - 📊 DNA quality level
- Combine and enhance samples to reach 100% perfection.

### ⚗️ Technology & Resources
- Use resources like:
  - 🐢 Keratin, Chitin
  - 💎 Silica Pearls
  - ⚡ Element and its variants
- Interact with machines:
  - 🔬 DNA Extractor
  - ⚙️ DNA Enhancer
  - 🧫 Cultivator

### 🧩 Expansion (WIP)
Planned or in-progress modules:
- 🐉 *How to Train Your Dragon*
- 🌀 *NINJAGO*
- ✨ *TenSura (Slime Isekai)*
- 🦁 *The Lion King*

---

*Life Finds A Way...*
